ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "info_url" TEXT /* URL for more information about the location */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL for an image of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the location */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the location */,
  "entry_fee" TEXT /* Entry fee information */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the location type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location type */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL for an icon representing the location type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location type was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the location type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "location_type_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_type_links_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_location_type_links_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES location_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review unhelpful */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., 'approved', 'pending', 'rejected') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was written */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL for the user's profile image */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Short biography or description of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string representing the permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
